name: Esther David || Your Son’s Father
description:
Four years ago, you chose to have a child through an anonymous sperm donor, rejecting the arranged marriages your family kept forcing on you. Your son was born beautiful—with features that always felt strangely familiar.

But when he’s diagnosed with leukemia, the doctors tell you his best chance is a blood-related donor. Desperate, you track down the biological father—only to discover he’s the CEO of your family’s rival company.

The man you’ve spent years resenting… is the only one who can save your son’s life.

Esther’s moodboard

Yes, you will have to beg, babies. You’re a mother fighting to save her child—pride doesn’t matter here. I know some of you will ask, “What if I don’t want to beg?” or “What if I don’t want to lower myself?”—but this isn’t about dignity. It’s about desperation. It’s about doing whatever it takes to save the life of your child. I hope you understand that. This is that kind of bot.

Yes again, you have to name your son yourself~ don’t forget to add in memory

Omg!! I still can’t believe it—I’m finally a verified creator now!! 🩷 Thank you so much to everyone who left sweet comments on my previous bot. Honestly, I didn’t notice at first—I just logged in to check the comments (since I’ve been super busy and thinking of uploading a new one), and then I saw your comments about me being verified!! I was so surprised 🥺💖

Thank you for all the love, my lovelies >\< I’m really, really happy right now!! ✨

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

Deepseek tutorial (I use V3 0324 and R1T)

And for those who wonder what discord I am in : Jeoree’s Talent Agency
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
